title: Ciyc@ra' #5516
definition:
Sisera = "battle array"

 1) the conquering general under king Jabin of Hazor and slain by Jael
 2) ancestor of a family of temple slaves who returned from exile with
    Zerubbabel
nasbUsage:
Definition: Sisera = "battle array"

 1) the conquering general under king Jabin of Hazor and slain by Jael
 2) ancestor of a family of temple slaves who returned from exile with
    Zerubbabel

    NASB:  a general of the king of Hazor, also the father of some returning exiles
